reasoning: The question asks whether AquaBounty Technologies filed for bankruptcy before July 1, 2025. The forecast date is April 11, 2026, meaning this is a past event. Extensive searches over the period before and after July 1, 2025, yield no records of any bankruptcy filing. Instead, the evidence shows the company continued to file standard SEC reports (e.g., a 10-Q filed on August 5, 2025) without operating as a debtor-in-possession. Furthermore, an October 2025 news report discusses an operational halt and leadership shake-up, and April 2026 news details a $4.3M debt-to-equity exchange and preferred stock sale (an out-of-court debt restructuring). If the company had filed for Chapter 11 or 7 prior to July 2025, this subsequent financial history and media coverage would look drastically different. I am highly confident they did not file for bankruptcy before the target date.
